component.name: iOpenPod
component.summary: Ditch iTunes. Sync your iPod the open way.

description.p: iOpenPod is a free, open-source desktop application that lets you manage your iPod without iTunes. Plug in your iPod and sync from any file format — FLAC, OGG, MP3 — iOpenPod automatically handles conversion.

ul.li: Sync music from any format with automatic transcoding to ALAC or AAC
Built-in podcast manager — subscribe, download, and sync episodes
Play count and rating sync back from iPod
Album art written in the iPod's native RGB565 format
Sync review with per-item checkboxes before anything changes

description.p: Works with every click-wheel iPod Apple ever made: iPod 1G–5.5G, iPod Mini 1G–2G, iPod Classic 6G–7G, and iPod Nano 1G–7G.
